articles.title: Evan Turner thinks the Celtics’ season would have gone differently with Jayson Tatum in, Jaylen Brown out
articles.description:
“I think Jayson would be first in the East, and I think they would’ve made it out that game seven.”

The post Evan Turner thinks the Celtics’ season would have gone differently with Jayson Tatum in, Jaylen Brown out appeared first on Boston.com.
